concerns.text: SC-002 validates that the optimal propagation lag lies within 30–90 min, but the lag is *computed* from the same solar‑wind speed series (FR‑004: L = D / Vsw) that is later used as the predictor. This makes the validation circular: the claim that the lag is physically reasonable is merely restating the assumption used to generate the lag‑adjusted Vsw series.

The lag‑search scans a 30–90 min window and selects the lag that maximises absolute correlation, yet only a Bonferroni correction for the two correlation tests (Pearson & Spearman) is applied. The multiple comparisons introduced by testing many candidate lags are not accounted for, inflating the false‑positive rate of the claimed optimal lag.
